task_completion.description: Create a new list called 'Survey Extent' in Garmin BaseCamp.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Garmin BaseCamp library pane shows a list named 'Survey Extent'.
Four waypoints with the exact names 'BB-NW', 'BB-NE', 'BB-SW', and 'BB-SE' are visible on the map or in the data pane.

task_completion.description: Organize the four waypoints into the 'Survey Extent' list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Survey Extent' list is selected in the library pane, and the four 'BB-*' waypoints are displayed as its contents.

task_completion.description: Export the waypoints to 'track_bounding_box.gpx' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog or file explorer shows 'track_bounding_box.gpx' being saved or existing in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.

task_completion.description: Create a report file named 'bounding_box_report.txt' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open saving/editing 'bounding_box_report.txt', or the file is visible in the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: The report contains bounding box coordinates (North, South, East, West) in decimal degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'bounding_box_report.txt' show four directional coordinates (N, S, E, W) formatted as decimal degrees.

task_completion.description: The report contains approximate North-South and East-West spans in kilometers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'bounding_box_report.txt' show distance measurements in kilometers (km) for both North-South and East-West spans.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to create lists and waypoints.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Garmin BaseCamp menus, map, and library, rather than using a terminal or script to generate the data.

integrity.description: The agent used BaseCamp's built-in export feature to create the GPX file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Export' dialog box native to Garmin BaseCamp is visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely extracted coordinates and distances using BaseCamp tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening waypoint properties to view coordinates or using the measure tool to find spans, rather than typing answers without checking the application.
